title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: At site of Russia’s Oreshnik strike, Putin’s propaganda lies in ruins In a dusty industrial estate in the city of Bila Tserkva, a Ukrainian grandmother searches through the smouldering ruins of her storage unit for her harvest of potatoes. Two days earlier it had been hit with what is supposed to be one of Russia’s most fearsome weapons — an Oreshnik intermediate-range ballistic missile (IRBM)....

title: Casualties reported
description: 🤡 The information about the occupation of Vozdvizhivka, which is near Gulyaipol, is not true 🇷🇺 Pig dogs infiltrated the village 2-3 weeks ago. Those who could not be detected and killed in time managed to raise several flags. A quick sweep was immediately carried out. Freaks are captured or eliminated. Katsapia flags destroyed. 📍 Location — Vozdvizhivka. Map🛑Blog🛑Write to us🛑 ZSUHelp🛑Support us (ht

description_uk: 🤡 Інформація про окупацію Воздвижівки, яка поблизу Гуляйполя, не відповідає дійсності 🇷🇺 Свинособаки тижні 2-3 тому просочилися в село. Ті, кого не змогли вчасно виявити та вбити, зуміли підняти декілька прапорів. Відразу було проведено швидку зачистку. Виродків взято в полон або ліквідовано. Прапори кацапії знищено. 📍 Локація — Воздвижівка. Мапа🛑Блог🛑Написати нам🛑 ЗСУHelp🛑Підтримати нас(ht

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Ukraine fails to pass IMF-backed reforms, despite millions of dollars on the line Ukraine’s access to billions in much-needed cash is once again hanging in the balance as lawmakers stumble on reforms. title_uk: Кожен, хто воює за Україну у складі Сил спеціальних операцій...
description: Everyone who fights for Ukraine in the Special Operations Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine - thank you for your service for our country, for your extraordinary courage and for your daily strong results! The forces of special operations went through all the battles of this war, which were the most difficult, the most brutal and the most important for Ukraine. They also carry out tasks in the direction of our long-range sanctions against Russia...
description_en: Everyone who fights for Ukraine in the Special Operations Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine - thank you for your service for our country, for your extraordinary courage and for your daily strong results! The forces of special operations went through all the battles of this war, which were the most difficult, the most brutal and the most important for Ukraine. They also carry out tasks in the direction of our long-range sanctions against Russia...
description_uk: Кожен, хто б’ється заради України в Силах спеціальних операцій Збройних Сил України, – дякую вам за службу заради нашої держави, за надзвичайну сміливість і за щоденні сильні результати! Сили спеціальних операцій пройшли всі битви цієї війни, які були найбільш складними, найбільш жорстокими й найбільш важливими для України. Виконують завдання і за напрямком наших далекобійних санкцій проти Росії...

title: Strike confirmed on residential building
description: Storm Shadow again "welcomed" the headquarters of the Black Sea Fleet of the Russian Federation in Sevastopol this night. Moreover, our new and old missiles were already blown up in 2023. According to analysts, a fire broke out inside the building after the impact.
description_en: Storm Shadow again "welcomed" the headquarters of the Black Sea Fleet of the Russian Federation in Sevastopol this night. Moreover, our new and old missiles were already blown up in 2023. According to analysts, a fire broke out inside the building after the impact.
description_uk: Storm Shadow этой ночью снова «поприветствовали» штаб Черноморского флота рф в Севастополе Причем уже новый — старый наши ракеты разнесли еще в 2023 году. По данным аналитиков, после удара внутри здания вспыхнул пожар.
